tweets.author: vmg-ylw.bsky.social
tweets.text: When 50% of #BTC supply is in profit and 50% in loss, it indicates a market bottom or capitulation point. This convergence means the market is evenly split between holders underwater and those in profit—historically marking bear market bottoms (2015, 2018, 2020, 2022). #Bitcoin

tweets.text: The platform's TVL is close to $6 billion, near all-time highs. Social engagement is also at an all-time high. And the open interest moves in sync with price, meaning this is spot-driven demand, not a leverage bubble. #Bitcoin is doing this too, but Hyperliquid is doing it faster
